description: A portrait-format graphic with a dark blue background and a faint enlarged agency seal watermark. Large metallic capital text at the top reads ARRESTED. Centered below is a framed photograph of an older man with gray hair, wearing a light pink button-up shirt, standing indoors in what looks like an office lobby. A red banner across the lower part of the photo reads CHINESE NATIONAL in white italics, with the Department of Homeland Security seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; CHINESE NATIONAL; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
